class.name: SQLiteBackup
class.brief_description: Provides control over an ongoing database backup or restore operation.
class.description: Represents a backup process between two databases. It allows copying data incrementally, making it suitable for non-blocking or asynchronous backup and restore operations.

method.name: finish
method.description: Completes the backup operation and releases associated resources. This should be called when the backup is no longer needed or has finished.

method.name: get_page_count
method.description: Returns the total number of pages in the source database being backed up.

method.name: get_remaining
method.description: Returns the number of pages that still need to be copied to complete the backup.

method.name: step
method.description:
Copies up to [param pages] pages from the source database to the destination.
Returns a result code indicating the current state of the operation. Repeated calls can be made until all pages are copied.
